title: DERIVATIONS OF THE LOCALLY NILPOTENT MATRIX RINGS
author_string: LEVCHUK, VLADIMIR M., RADCHENKO, OKSANA V.
journal: Journal of Algebra and Its Applications
publisher: World Scientific Pub Co Pte Lt
abstract: Derivations of the ring of all finitary niltriangular matrices over an arbitrary associative ring with identity for any chain of matrix indices are described. Every Lie or Jordan derivation is a derivation of this ring modulo third hypercenter.
